snps.effect_template: Complement Factor H Y402H variant. Major AMD risk factor (OR ~2.5 per allele).
ARMS2/HTRA1 locus. Second major AMD risk locus with strong effect.

recommendation_template: Protect eyes from UV light, don't smoke, eat leafy greens (lutein/zeaxanthin). Regular eye exams become more important with genetic risk. AREDS supplements may help in intermediate stages.

studies.title: Complement factor H polymorphism in age-related macular degeneration
studies.finding: CFH Y402H (rs1061170 C) increases AMD risk 2.5-fold per allele
